column1: 2004-05-26‚Äé"One day
column2: 3 women
column6: traveled to America.  Because they skipped customs
column7: they were taken to prison and charged as being communists.  After a quick trial
column8: all 3 were sentenced to the chair.  The red head was up first.  ""I just graduated from theology school
column9: and I know the grace of God is with me.  Because of this
column10: I will not die.""  They threw the switch
column11: but nothing happened.  They quickly let her go.  The the brunette was up.  ""I graduated from Law School
column12: and I know the judicial system will save me.""  Again
column14: but nothing happened.  They let her go too.  Then the blonde was up.  ""I just graduated from an electrical school
column15: and I know for a fact that this chair won't work until you plug it in."""

column1: 2004-05-25‚Äé"I have had many requests to put in a post about the annoying teachers at my school.  We all have them
column2: but not all of us get to put them on a web site.  Probably my number one least favorite teacher is a guy named Mr. Wright.  Take his actions last week for example.  ""Sorry about this
column3: but I am required to teach you guys how to write a college level research paper.  Seeing as how we only have 2 weeks left of school
column4: I think it is a good idea I spring this on you now.  I don't know what I want from you guys yet
column5: but go ahead and get started
column6: I might feel like coming up with those details later.""  Another one of my particularly distasteful picks would have to be my orchestra teacher
column7: Mr. Kibler (Keebler).  He decided to let only the upperclassman on the computers in the room
column8: and password protect the computer and give all the older kids the password
column9: leaving us freshmen and sophomores with bull.  ""I decided you guys aren't good enough to go on the computers
column10: so I shut you all off of them.  When you guys have a study hall
column11: you're just SOL.""  It's not that he's a bad teacher
column12: he's just freakin' annoying.  Now that I have had a turn to vent
column13: I invite you all to share some of your annoying teachers with the rest of these great readers."

column2: since we all love the song ""Dare You to Move
column3: I went on a mission to find out exactly what the word ""fallout"" means.  As we all know
column4: the word occurs in the song at the beginning of the second verse where the lead singer (blonde guy with the very nice hair
column6: I prefer the bassist's hair.) sings
column8: welcome to existence...Et cetera.""    Below is the dictionary definition:     fallout n.   1.  The slow descent of minute particles of debris in the atmosphere following an explosion
column9: especially the descent of radioactive debris after a nuclear explosion.    Jiggawats?  I don't know about y'all
column10: but I had to read that a few times before I understood what was going on. Mildly understood. I really don't understand.  I couldn't explain it to you that is (that means don't ask.)  So what is Switchfoot trying to say here?  Is it the apocalypse brought upon my nuclear war?  Switchfoot has Christian themed music (Joc saw them at Creation.) so maybe this has a deeper meaning?  Did the Straylight Run have to look up what fallout meant too
column11: and then named their song ""slow descent"" because of the definition?  All I know is that I was being mislead as to what ""fallout"" meant....and they told us to use context clues in school...psh..."
